name: Short Game Golf
about: Short Game USA is a comprehensive golf destination offering both indoor and outdoor facilities. The venue features indoor TrackMan simulators and covered bays for year-round play, along with a dedicated short game area and putting greens with PuttView technology. It serves as a hub for skill development with club fitting services, lessons for adults and juniors, and a pro shop stocked with top golf brands. The facility operates on a pay-for-use model, with pricing starting at $25 per hour per bay for up to six players, and emphasizes a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere suitable for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for detailed swing analysis and course simulation
Family-friendly environment with dedicated kids' lessons and junior programs
Comprehensive services including club fitting, repair, and a pro shop with top brands

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food and dining available, creating a relaxed atmosphere for golfers.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy found.

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple indoor TrackMan simulators providing detailed performance data and course play.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers club rentals, but you are also welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site food and dining option available for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes about 2 to 3 hours, depending on the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Short Game USA is family-friendly and offers specific programs for kids, including weekly group lessons and junior golf camps.
